productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Blended Navy Blue Belt
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers, or act as a styling detail to your outfit. This twill tape belt from fastrack is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Made of twill tape with Leatherette below the buckle and tail for durability and style Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Brand name embossed below the buckle Care Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
